name: create-network-service
query: Create Sources/NetworkService.swift. It should contain: struct User: Codable with properties id: Int and name: String; struct NetworkService with an async func fetchUser(id: Int) async throws -> User that uses URLSession.shared to GET https://example.com/users/\(id), decodes the JSON into User via JSONDecoder, and throws on failure. Use import Foundation. No explanation.
